title: felicia ferulacea
intro: Felicia ferulacea, also known as Blue Felicia or Blue Eyed Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its blue or purple flowers and yellow centers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Felicia ferulacea include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
